name: motionkit-pro-figma-plugin
description: MotionKit Pro - Professional motion design suite for Figma with 12 animation presets, custom keyframe builder, interactive easing/spring curve editors, advanced stagger engines, and multi-framework code export (CSS, Tailwind, Framer Motion, GSAP, Web Animations API).

scripts.build: echo "Vanilla plugin - no compilation or build step required. MotionKit is immediately loadable and runnable in Figma using manifest.json!"
